javascript:(function()%7Bvar%20d%3Ddocument%2Cw%3Dwindow%3Bfunction%20SP()%7Btry%7Bvar%20c%3Dw._spPageContextInfo%3Bif(c%26%26c.webServerRelativeUrl)return%20c.webServerRelativeUrl.replace(%2F%5C%2F%24%2F%2C'')%2B%22%2FShared%2520Documents%2FTadori%22%3B%7Dcatch(e)%7B%7Dreturn%20''%3B%7Dvar%20sp%3DSP()%2Cdev%3D''%3Btry%7Bif(w.localStorage%26%26localStorage.getItem('tadori.dev.bundle-source')%3D%3D%3D'local')dev%3D(localStorage.getItem('tadori.dev.local-base')%7C%7C'http%3A%2F%2F127.0.0.1%3A18080%2Ftadori').replace(%2F%5C%2F%2B%24%2F%2C'')%3B%7Dcatch(e)%7B%7Dvar%20primary%3Ddev%7C%7C%22%22%7C%7Csp%3Bvar%20fb%3D(primary!%3D%3Dsp%26%26sp)%3Fsp%3A''%3Bfunction%20inject(base%2Cver)%7Bvar%20o%3Dd.getElementById('tadori-script')%3Bif(o)o.remove()%3Bvar%20s%3Dd.createElement('script')%3Bs.id%3D'tadori-script'%3Bs.src%3Dbase%2B'%2Ftadori.bundle.js%3Fv%3D'%2BencodeURIComponent(ver)%3Bs.onerror%3Dfunction()%7Bif(fb)%7Bvar%20x%3Dfb%3Bfb%3D''%3Bgo(x)%3B%7D%7D%3Bd.body.appendChild(s)%3B%7Dfunction%20go(base)%7Bfetch(base%2B'%2Fversion.txt%3Ft%3D'%2BDate.now()%2C%7Bcredentials%3A'include'%7D).then(function(r)%7Bif(!r.ok)throw%200%3Breturn%20r.text()%3B%7D).then(function(t)%7Binject(base%2C(t%7C%7C'').trim()%7C%7CString(Date.now()))%3B%7D).catch(function()%7Bif(fb)%7Bvar%20x%3Dfb%3Bfb%3D''%3Bgo(x)%3B%7Delse%7Binject(base%2CString(Date.now()))%3B%7D%7D)%3B%7Dgo(primary)%3B%7D)()%3B
